::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">10</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1039/d5sc03070f" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
article URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">Pre-synthetic redox control of structure and properties in copper TTFtt coordination polymers</span>

N. Jiang, S. Velliyarat, C.-Y. Lien, H. L. Nguyen, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, J.-H. Chen, A. Ramanathan, A. S. Filatov, H. S. La Pierre, S. Patel, K. W. Chapman, J.-Niklas Boyn, and J. S. Anderson

*Chem. Sci.* **2025**, *16*, 19304. DOI: 10.1039/d5sc03070f
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](10_2025_CuTTFtt/CUTTFtt_TOC.jpg)
:::

:::
